clause_text: The tenant shall pay rent on the first day of each month.
simple_clause: The renter must pay rent on the first day of each month.

clause_text: If payment is more than five days late, the landlord may charge a reasonable late fee as allowed by law.
simple_clause: If rent is over five days late, the landlord can charge a reasonable late fee if the law allows it.

clause_text: The landlord must provide written notice before entering the rental property except in an emergency.
simple_clause: The landlord must give written notice before entering, except in an emergency.

clause_text: The tenant must keep all security codes and building access information confidential.
simple_clause: The renter must keep security codes and building access information private.

clause_text: Either party may terminate this agreement after a material breach and written notice.
simple_clause: Either side can end the agreement after a serious breach and written notice.

clause_text: The landlord shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages except where prohibited by law.
simple_clause: The landlord is not responsible for indirect or consequential damages unless the law says otherwise.

clause_text: The tenant must keep the rental property clean and avoid causing damage.
simple_clause: The renter must keep the property clean and avoid damage.
